name: How long til I get check after falling at work?

mainEntity.name: How long til I get check after falling at work?

acceptedAnswer.description: **First workers' comp check in 2-4 weeks if undisputed; complex cases take months.** Utah mandates first payment within 20 days of claim.[1] Key factors: (1) Retroactive from disability date; (2) Delays for investigation; (3) Appeals extend. Track status. Attorney speeds process.
